name: claude-hooks-server-process
tags: server FastAPI persistent launchd port 8766 hook server plist install health check server log
body: Hook server is a persistent FastAPI process (hooks/server.py) on port 8766, managed by launchd. Plist generated at install time from launchd/com.claude-hooks-pipeline.plist.template — install_server.sh substitutes __HOME__, __UV__, __UV_DIR__, __REPO__ with real values. Runs from the test worktree (~~/workspace/claude-hooks-test). Health check: curl http://127.0.0.1:8766/health → {"status":"ok"}. Server log: /tmp/claude-hooks-server.log.
